idea-plugin.change-notes:
Version 2.1.3

First-run welcome notification with format shortcuts.
Friendlier message while Flutter downloads a fresh Dart SDK.
Diagnostics page lists the dart_format log; bug reports include it and the process id.
Plugin log files older than 30 days are pruned on startup.

Version 2.1.1

Compatibility plumbing for upcoming dart_format security hardening.

Version 2.0.38

Formatting runs in a cancelable progress dialog with a file count.
Auto-recovery after a Dart SDK upgrade.
Newer dart_format versions on pub.dev install immediately.
Disabling or updating the plugin no longer leaves a stray dart_format process behind.

Version 2.0.36

Linux/macOS: picks up dart / flutter on PATH via ~/.zshrc or ~/.bashrc.
Error notifications show the plugin log path; settings has a new Diagnostics section.

Version 2.0.35

Improved handling of unexpected dart_format process exit during startup.

Version 2.0.32

Added new shortcut Ctrl/Command+Alt+L.
"Fix spaces" is no longer experimental.

Version 2.0.23
Better error reporting when Dart executable not found.

Version 2.0.21
Updated IntelliJ compatibility.

Version 2.0.20
Fixed startup problems on Windows.

Version 2.0.19
Added "Fix spaces" (experimental).

Version 2.0.18
Fixed startup problems on Linux/macOS.

Version 2.0.17
Now installs and updates the dart_format package automatically.

Version 2.0.16
Fixed UTF-8 handling. Better notifications.

Version 2.0.15
Fixed startup problems on Linux/macOS and better notifications.

Version 2.0.9
Fixed issue with temp dir for Linux/macOS.

Version 2.0.8
Fixed compatibility issue with JetBrains.

Version 2.0.7
Added "open warning/error location" to notification when location is available.

Version 2.0.6
Fixed path to external dart_format for Linux/macOS.

Version 2.0.5
Better installation instructions for the dart_format package.
Added version check for the dart_format package.
Better error reporting.

Version 2.0.4
Better error logging and reporting.

Version 2.0.0
Complete rewrite of the plugin. Now uses the dart_format package on pub.dev.
idea-plugin.description:
A configurable formatter for Dart and Flutter.

A drop-in alternative to dart format / dartfmt with the same one-shortcut workflow — but you choose the rules. Works in IntelliJ IDEA, Android Studio, and other JetBrains IDEs on Windows, macOS, and Linux.

Keeps your line breaks. No forced wrapping at a line-length limit, no inserted or removed line breaks — unless you explicitly enable an option that adds them. Your layout stays yours.

What you can configure:
  • Newlines before / after { and } (Allman braces)
  • Newline after ; (one statement per line)
  • Trailing newline at end of file
  • Fix spaces (normalize around operators / keywords)
  • Indent width (spaces per level)
  • Max consecutive empty lines
  • Strip trailing commas
Every option is off by default, so the formatter only changes what you ask it to.

Shortcuts:
Ctrl/Cmd+Alt+, — format the active file or the selected Dart files/folders
Ctrl/Cmd+Alt+L — format the selection (Dart via DartFormat, other file types via the built-in formatter)

How it works:
Formatting runs locally — the plugin talks to a dart_format server on localhost, installed automatically from pub.dev.

Also for VS Code: DartFormat on the Visual Studio Marketplace

Source & issues:
Plugin: GitHub — Issues
Formatter: GitHub — Issues
idea-plugin.name: DartFormat
